attention.disconnected_one: {{agents}} hook missing or outdated — reconnect in Agent hooks
attention.disconnected_other: {{agents}} hooks missing or outdated — reconnect in Agent hooks
attention.retrust_one: {{agents}} hook updated by Atoll — re-trust in Agent hooks
attention.retrust_other: {{agents}} hooks updated by Atoll — re-trust in Agent hooks
attention.mixed: {{agents}} hooks need attention — check Agent hooks

note.claude: Works with Claude Code CLI and Desktop. After install: use Ask permissions in Claude Desktop, restart Claude, then trigger a Bash permission once.
note.codex: Works with Codex CLI and Desktop. After install: trust the Atoll hook in Codex Desktop or via /hooks, restart Codex, then trigger one shell permission.
note.cursor: Works with Cursor IDE Agent and Ask modes. After install: confirm hooks in Cursor Settings, restart Cursor, then send a message in Agent or Ask mode to verify.

register.claude: Registers Claude Code hooks for permission approval. {{note}}
register.codex: Registers Codex hooks for permission approval. {{note}}
register.cursor: Registers Cursor hooks for permission approval. {{note}}

checklist.claudeNode: Install Node.js on this machine before installing hooks.
checklist.claudePermissions: In Claude Desktop, set permissions to Ask permissions.
checklist.claudeRestart: Quit and reopen Claude Desktop after installing hooks.
checklist.claudeVerify: Trigger one Bash permission in a local Code session to verify.
checklist.codexNode: Install Node.js on this machine before installing hooks.
checklist.codexTrust: In Codex Desktop or CLI, open /hooks and trust the Atoll hook.
checklist.codexRestart: Quit and reopen Codex Desktop after installing hooks.
checklist.codexVerify: Trigger one shell permission in a local session to verify.
checklist.cursorNode: Install Node.js on this machine before installing hooks.
checklist.cursorSettings: In Cursor, open Settings → Hooks and confirm Atoll hooks are loaded.
checklist.cursorVerify: Send a message in Agent or Ask mode to verify.

warning.scriptMissing: Hook script missing from the app bundle. Reinstall Atoll if install fails.
warning.nodeNotFound: Node.js not found at the configured hook path. Install Node.js, then reinstall hooks.
warning.devBuildPath: Hook points to a dev build path. Reinstall hooks from Atoll.app, then trust again in Codex.

retrust.codex: Codex may still be using an older cached copy of the Atoll hook script. Click Reinstall hooks in Atoll, or open /hooks in Codex and re-approve the Atoll hook, then restart Codex.
retrust.claude: Atoll updated the Claude hook script since it was last approved. Reopen Claude Code / Claude Desktop permissions and re-allow the Atoll hook, then restart Claude.
retrust.cursor: Atoll updated the Cursor hook script since it was last loaded. Reopen Cursor Settings → Hooks to reload it, then restart Cursor.
retrust.default: Atoll updated this hook script since it was last trusted. Re-confirm it in the agent app, then restart.

error.codexNotSaved: Codex hooks were not saved. Check permissions on ~/.codex/hooks.json.
error.cursorNotSaved: Cursor hooks were not saved. Check permissions on ~/.cursor/hooks.json.
